validations.name: input_inventory_completeness
validations.evidence: All 4 mandatory 42.22 inputs present and readable. File-level SHA-256 recorded for each.

validations.name: 42_22_stream_complete
validations.evidence: 42.22 validation_log.json carries status = COMPLETE, 18/18 validations PASS, 0 fail-closed triggers fired.

validations.name: emphasis_present_in_runtime_exposure
validations.evidence: attribute_lineage.json confirms emphasis field present in all 5 runtime records. pass_through_confirmed = true.

validations.name: governed_closed_set_explicit
validations.evidence: attribute_lineage.json carries closed_set = [high, medium, low, none] verbatim. All 4 values are governed. NONE is a governed member, not a fallback.

validations.name: emphasis_values_within_closed_set
validations.evidence: All 5 runtime records carry emphasis = none. none is within governed closed set. No out-of-set value present.

validations.name: emphasis_layer_origin_confirmed
validations.evidence: attribute_lineage.json records layer_origin = 44.3, carrier_layer = 44.2. No emphasis originates in 42.x or 51.x.

validations.name: no_direct_upstream_dependency
validations.evidence: Rendering specification consumes only 42.22 runtime-exposed artifacts. No direct reads from 43.x or 44.x artifacts required.

validations.name: mapping_table_complete
validations.evidence: Static mapping table covers all 4 governed closed-set values: high → RENDER_RED, medium → RENDER_AMBER, low → RENDER_NEUTRAL, none → RENDER_NONE. No value unmapped.

validations.name: mapping_one_to_one
validations.evidence: Each emphasis value maps to exactly one visual state. Each visual state produced by exactly one emphasis value. No ambiguity.

validations.name: none_not_treated_as_fallback
validations.evidence: RENDER_NONE is declared as governed mapping outcome. rendering_spec.md and ui_mapping_contract.md state explicitly: NONE is not a rendering default, not a fallback, not a repair.

validations.name: determinism_confirmed
validations.evidence: Mapping table is fixed. No dynamic thresholds. No recalculation. Identical input produces identical specified output.

validations.name: no_interpretation_introduced
validations.evidence: Rendering specification does not redefine emphasis semantics. No scoring, weighting, aggregation, or convergence logic introduced.

validations.name: no_semantic_extension
validations.evidence: No new semantic fields introduced. Rendering layer consumes verbatim runtime-exposed attributes only.

validations.name: topology_preservation_defined
validations.evidence: Rendering spec defines topology preservation rules: no filtering, grouping, suppression, or reordering based on emphasis.

validations.name: traceability_defined
validations.evidence: ui_mapping_contract.md defines traceability chain: attachment_id → projection_reference → binding_id → signal_id. All traceable to 42.22 runtime records.

validations.name: fail_closed_rules_defined
validations.evidence: 8 fail-closed conditions defined in rendering_spec.md. 7 termination conditions defined in ui_mapping_contract.md.

validations.name: closure_wording_specification_safe
validations.evidence: rendering_spec.md section heading is 'Observed Sample-Runtime Distribution (from 42.22, non-canonical)' with explicit label 'This is evidence only. It does not define rendering semantics.'

validations.name: no_canonical_artifact_produced
validations.evidence: Stream 51.1 produces specification artifacts only. No canonical artifact produced. No upstream artifact modified.

validations.name: no_runtime_modification
validations.evidence: No 42.x, 43.x, or 44.x artifacts modified. Rendering specification is additive and non-destructive.

validations.name: no_fail_closed_triggers_fired
validations.evidence: All fail-closed conditions checked: inputs present, emphasis fields present, values within governed closed set, mapping complete and unambiguous, NONE not a fallback, provenance sufficient, no inference required.
